should_trigger.prompt: Walk me through this plan so I understand it
Brief me on the plan.md before I start working
Explain this plan interactively — I have questions
Can you give me a summary of what this plan involves?

should_not_trigger.prompt: Create a new plan for the auth refactor
Start working on the plan tasks
Commit the current changes and push to the remote branch

hard_should_trigger.prompt: I want to understand what this plan does before approving it
After fixing the bug, also check if brief needs updating

hard_should_not_trigger.prompt: Enhance this existing plan with more research
Fix this bug then run the test suite and review the results
